policy.exit_criteria: Every registered source site is replaced by a reviewed class, bounded CSS custom-property contract, or another representation compatible with style-src-attr 'none'.

exceptions.reason: Build progress width is rendered from the typed i32 BuildJob.progress field.
exceptions.constraints: The value is numeric transport data and the source site may set only width in percent; it must not accept a CSS string.
exceptions.exit_criteria: Replace the width attribute with a reviewed progress component contract that remains functional under style-src-attr 'none'.

exceptions.reason: Category cards expose a persisted visual accent.
exceptions.constraints: Category colors are rejected before persistence unless they match the strict hex grammar, then normalized again at the JSON model boundary before this source site is rendered.
exceptions.exit_criteria: Replace arbitrary category accents with a reviewed finite palette or a non-inline theming contract.

exceptions.reason: Storefront category cards expose the same persisted visual accent as the admin surface.
exceptions.constraints: The persistence hook, transport model and direct accent helper all reject non-hex CSS tokens and declaration separators.
exceptions.exit_criteria: Replace arbitrary category accents with a reviewed finite palette or a non-inline theming contract.

exceptions.reason: The legacy canvas uses runtime geometry for layer indentation, iframe sizing, and selection or insertion overlays.
exceptions.constraints: Generated values are numeric canvas coordinates and dimensions owned by typed Page Builder state; no tenant-authored CSS string may be concatenated into these host attributes.
exceptions.exit_criteria: Retire the legacy canvas or move every remaining host geometry site to a reviewed CSS custom-property or DOM style API contract.

exceptions.reason: The isolated authoring canvas continuously projects typed viewport and overlay geometry into the host document.
exceptions.constraints: Only numeric width, height, scale, position, and visibility values from typed canvas state are emitted.
exceptions.exit_criteria: Introduce a reviewed bounded CSS custom-property bridge or direct DOM geometry adapter compatible with style-src-attr 'none'.

exceptions.reason: Layer indentation is computed from the typed tree depth.
exceptions.constraints: The source site emits only a numeric padding-left value derived from layer.depth.
exceptions.exit_criteria: Replace unbounded depth padding with a finite reviewed indentation class scale or another non-inline hierarchy treatment.

exceptions.reason: Resize preview and handle positions must follow pointer-driven typed geometry in real time.
exceptions.constraints: Only numeric geometry and a cursor selected from the closed ResizeHandle enum are emitted.
exceptions.exit_criteria: Move resize positioning to a reviewed DOM adapter or bounded CSS custom-property bridge compatible with style-src-attr 'none'.
